ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.quality_notes: High quality, text-based PDF. Two pages: page 1 is ORIGINAL, page 2 is COPY. Verification based on ORIGINAL (page 1).

invoice.quality_notes: High quality, text-based PDF. Pages 1 and 3 are invoice pages (Page 1 OF 2, Page 2 OF 2). Pages 2 and 4 are Terms and Conditions of Sale. Invoice number 97805446, dated 05.12.2024.

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The remarks field contains '09/01-10/225 / 25.11.2023' which is an order/contract reference, not an LC reference. No field labeled 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' or similar bank term was identified.

locations_found: Invoice page 1: header top-left 'GRACE Catalyst AB'
Invoice page 1: address block 'GRACE Catalyst AB, Industrivägen, 44432 Stenungsund, Sweden'
Invoice page 1: 'Shipped From: GRACE Catalyst AB Stenungsund'
Invoice page 1: footer 'Grace Catalyst AB, Org. Nr.: 556613-5504'
Invoice page 3: header top-left 'GRACE Catalyst AB'
Invoice page 3: address block 'GRACE Catalyst AB, Industrivägen, 44432 Stenungsund, Sweden'
Invoice page 3: footer 'Grace Catalyst AB, Org. Nr.: 556613-5504'

criteria_met: Consignor 'Grace Catalyst AB' identified in invoice as issuer 'GRACE Catalyst AB' — criterion 2 met.
Consignee 'Turkmenbashi oil refinery' identified in invoice Ship to field — criterion 3 met.
pairing_validation.motivation: Pairing validation passed. Certificate consignor 'Grace Catalyst AB' matches invoice issuer 'GRACE Catalyst AB'. Certificate consignee 'Turkmenbashi oil refinery' matches invoice Ship to party. No explicit invoice number reference in certificate to validate criterion 1, but criteria 2 and 3 are both satisfied.

candidates.normalized_text: 33 drums, 80 kg each, loaded on 11 pallets

candidates.source: Invoice page 1, header top-left and address block

candidates.normalized_text: 33 drums each of 80 kgs net, packed on 11 pallets

candidates.raw_text: Helensville Group FZE, Business Centre, Sharjah, Publishing City Free Zone, SHARJAH, UNIT.ARAB EMIR.
candidates.normalized_text: helensville group fze, sharjah, united arab emirates
candidates.source: Invoice page 1, buyer/bill-to address block (left side)

checkpoint_results.certificate_value: Grace Catalyst AB, Industrivägen, 44432, Stenungsund, Sweden
checkpoint_results.invoice_value: GRACE Catalyst AB, Industrivägen, 44432 Stenungsund, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for certificate consignor name 'Grace Catalyst AB' in all invoice pages.
comparison_steps.detail: The name 'GRACE Catalyst AB' is found in the invoice header (page 1 and page 3), address block, Shipped From field, and footer on all invoice pages. After case normalization, 'grace catalyst ab' matches exactly. This satisfies rule 4.1.0 directly.

comparison_steps.description: Verify country: certificate says 'Sweden', invoice address block says 'Sweden'. Additionally, VAT-ID prefix 'SE' confirms Sweden.
comparison_steps.detail: Country matches exactly: Sweden = Sweden. Additionally confirmed via VAT-ID prefix SE (rule 4.1.2.1).

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found explicitly in invoice
Indirect land identifier via VAT prefix SE

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'Grace Catalyst AB, Industrivägen, 44432, Stenungsund, Sweden'. Invoice issuer: 'GRACE Catalyst AB, Industrivägen, 44432 Stenungsund, Sweden'. After normalization of case, these are identical. The name 'GRACE Catalyst AB' appears prominently in the invoice header, address block, Shipped From field, and footer. Country 'Sweden' is explicit in the invoice address block and confirmed by VAT-ID prefix 'SE'. Rule 4.1.0 is satisfied: consignor name is expressly found in the invoice. Rule 4.1.4: country matches. Result: MATCH.
checkpoint_results.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Grace Catalyst AB' med adress i Stenungsund, Sweden identifieras direkt i fakturan som utställare 'GRACE Catalyst AB' med samma adress (Industrivägen, 44432 Stenungsund, Sweden). Landet bekräftas både explicit och via VAT-ID prefix SE.

comparison_steps.description: The invoice 'Sold-to' field contains only a customer number '870451', not a named party. No 'Invoice to' or 'Bill to' field with a named company exists. The buyer address block on the left shows 'Helensville Group FZE' in Sharjah, UAE, which appears to be the billing/commercial intermediary. The 'Ship to' field names 'Turkmenbashi oil refinery, 745005 TURKMENBASHI, TURKMENISTAN'.
comparison_steps.detail: The Sold-to field contains only a numeric customer ID (870451), not a named party. The buyer address block shows 'Helensville Group FZE' which is a different party from the certificate consignee. The certificate consignee 'Turkmenbashi oil refinery' is found exactly in the Ship to field. Applying the Ship-To-regel (4.2.0.3): (1) Certificate consignee matches Ship to exactly, (2) the Bill-To/buyer address is a different party (Helensville Group FZE), (3) both parties appear in the same invoice confirming they are in the same supply chain, (4) nothing contradicts that the consignee is the actual end receiver.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate says 'Turkmenistan'. Invoice Ship to says 'TURKMENISTAN'.
comparison_steps.detail: After case normalization: turkmenistan = turkmenistan. Country matches.

rules_applied.description: Ship-To-regel – Certificate of Origin issued for end receiver (Ship-To party)

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'Turkmenbashi oil refinery, 745005 TURKMENBASHI, Turkmenistan'. The invoice does not have a named Bill-to/Invoice-to company; the Sold-to field shows only customer number '870451'. The buyer address block shows 'Helensville Group FZE' in UAE, which is a different entity. The Ship to field shows 'Turkmenbashi oil refinery, 745005 TURKMENBASHI, TURKMENISTAN' — an exact match. Applying Ship-To-regel 4.2.0.3: all four conditions are met. (1) Certificate consignee exactly matches Ship to. (2) The Bill-To party is Helensville Group FZE, a different entity acting as trade intermediary. (3) Both parties appear in the same invoice. (4) No contradicting information. Country: Turkmenistan = TURKMENISTAN after normalization. Result: MATCH.
checkpoint_results.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Turkmenbashi oil refinery' med adress 745005 TURKMENBASHI, Turkmenistan identifieras exakt i fakturans Ship to-fält. Ship-To-regeln (4.2.0.3) tillämpas eftersom fakturans köparadress anger ett annat handelsbolag (Helensville Group FZE) medan certifikatet utfärdats för slutmottagaren. Land: Turkmenistan matchar.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Consignee should match the buyer address 'Helensville Group FZE'
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Rule 4.2.0.3 (Ship-To-regel) explicitly allows the certificate consignee to match the Ship to party when the Bill-to is a different commercial intermediary, which is the case here.

comparison_steps.description: The certificate does not contain an explicit article/part number (the text '5162280' appears only in the invoice). No article number in certificate to verify.
comparison_steps.detail: No article number identified in certificate. Proceed to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation in the certificate: 'POLYTRAK(R)8522W-T'. This is the product model/brand identifier. The broader description is 'Polypropylene Catalyst'. In the invoice: 'POLYTRAK®8522W-T'. After normalization: (R) and ® are equivalent representations of the registered trademark symbol.
comparison_steps.detail: The identity-bearing main designation 'POLYTRAK(R)8522W-T' from the certificate matches 'POLYTRAK®8522W-T' in the invoice after normalization of the registered trademark notation. Additionally, 'Polypropylene Catalyst' is a broader product category description. The invoice does not explicitly use 'Polypropylene Catalyst' but the product identifier POLYTRAK®8522W-T is an exact match. Per rule 4.3.4, additional text in the invoice (HS Code, 80KG) does not affect product identity.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching – identity-bearing main designation POLYTRAK(R)8522W-T matches POLYTRAK®8522W-T
Non-identity-bearing additions (HS Code, weight) do not affect match
Allowed normalization: (R) ↔ ® treated as equivalent trademark notation

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate goods: 'Polypropylene Catalyst, POLYTRAK(R)8522W-T'. Invoice goods: 'POLYTRAK®8522W-T 80KG HS Code:38151990'. The identity-bearing main designation is 'POLYTRAK(R)8522W-T'. In the invoice, this appears as 'POLYTRAK®8522W-T'. The symbols (R) and ® are different representations of the registered trademark symbol and are treated as equivalent under allowed normalization (punctuation). The core product identifier matches exactly. The additional text in the invoice (HS Code, weight notation) is non-identity-bearing per 4.3.4. No article number in certificate to verify. Result: MATCH.
checkpoint_results.motivation: Certifikatets varubeskrivning 'Polypropylene Catalyst, POLYTRAK(R)8522W-T' verifieras mot fakturans 'POLYTRAK®8522W-T'. Produktidentifieraren matchar exakt efter normalisering av varumärkessymbolen (R)/®. Ytterligare information i fakturan (HS-kod) påverkar inte produktidentiteten.

checkpoint_results.certificate_value: Net weight 2640 kg / Gross weight 3894 kg / Gross weight incl pallets 4147 kg
checkpoint_results.invoice_value: Net Weight 2.640 KG / Gross Weight 3.894 KG / Gross weight including pallets: 4147 kgs

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains three weight values: Net weight 2640 kg, Gross weight 3894 kg, Gross weight incl pallets 4147 kg. All three have explicit unit (kg) and weight category (NW, GW, GW incl pallets).
comparison_steps.detail: Three explicit weight values in box 7. Verification basis: all three.

comparison_steps.step: 4.4.3 – Verify Net weight 2640 kg against invoice
comparison_steps.description: Certificate: Net weight 2640 kg. Invoice: Net Weight 2.640 KG. Applying thousands separator normalization (4.4.3.3): '2.640' with period as thousands separator = 2640. Both are integers. The period functions as thousands separator (no decimal part).
comparison_steps.detail: 2640 kg (cert) = 2.640 KG (invoice after normalization removing thousands separator). Exact match. Weight category NW matches NW.

comparison_steps.step: 4.4.3 – Verify Gross weight 3894 kg against invoice
comparison_steps.description: Certificate: Gross weight 3894 kg. Invoice: Gross Weight 3.894 KG. Applying thousands separator normalization: '3.894' = 3894.
comparison_steps.detail: 3894 kg (cert) = 3.894 KG (invoice after normalization). Exact match. Weight category GW matches GW.

comparison_steps.step: 4.4.3 – Verify Gross weight incl pallets 4147 kg against invoice
comparison_steps.description: Certificate: Gross weight incl pallets 4147 kg. Invoice: 'Gross weight including pallets: 4147 kgs'.
comparison_steps.detail: 4147 kg (cert) = 4147 kgs (invoice). Exact numeric match. 'kg' and 'kgs' are equivalent.

comparison_steps.description: All three weight values match. No contradictions found between certificate and invoice weights.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 is verification basis – three weight values identified
Thousands separator normalization – period as thousands separator in invoice (2.640, 3.894)

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 quantities: Net weight 2640 kg, Gross weight 3894 kg, Gross weight incl pallets 4147 kg. Invoice quantities: Net Weight 2.640 KG, Gross Weight 3.894 KG, Gross weight including pallets: 4147 kgs. Applying thousands separator normalization (rule 4.4.3.3): invoice values '2.640' and '3.894' use period as thousands separator (both are whole numbers in context — 2640 kg net for 33 drums of 80 kg each = 2640 kg, and periods are in thousands position). After normalization: 2640, 3894, 4147 — all match certificate values exactly. Weight categories match (NW↔NW, GW↔GW, GW incl pallets↔GW including pallets). No contradictions per 4.4.3.1. Result: MATCH.
checkpoint_results.motivation: Certifikatets tre viktuppgifter (Nettovikt 2640 kg, Bruttovikt 3894 kg, Bruttovikt inkl pallar 4147 kg) verifieras mot fakturans motsvarande uppgifter (Net Weight 2.640 KG, Gross Weight 3.894 KG, Gross weight including pallets: 4147 kgs). Efter normalisering av tusentalsavskiljare (punkt) matchar samtliga värden exakt.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The period in '2.640' could be a decimal separator meaning 2.64 KG
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Context makes this impossible: 33 drums of 80 kg each = 2640 kg net weight. A net weight of 2.64 kg for a shipment of 33 drums is nonsensical. The period is unambiguously a thousands separator.

comparison_steps.description: The invoice explicitly states 'Country of Origin: China' on page 1, both in the product line and in the goods detail section ('Country of origin: China').
comparison_steps.detail: Two explicit origin references found in invoice, both stating 'China'.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'P:R. China'. This is a recognized form of 'People's Republic of China' / 'P.R. China'. The colon appears to be a punctuation variant. Normalized: 'China'. Invoice: 'China'. Normalized: 'China'.
comparison_steps.detail: 'P:R. China' (certificate) normalizes to 'China'. 'China' (invoice) = 'China'. Exact match after normalization.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in invoice via 'Country of Origin' field
Normalization: P:R. China → China, matching invoice's China
Origin has no connection to consignor's country – Sweden consignor with China origin is valid

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'P:R. China'. This is a standard abbreviation for People's Republic of China with a minor punctuation variant (colon instead of period). After normalization this is 'China'. The invoice explicitly states 'Country of Origin: China' in two places on page 1. China = China after normalization. The fact that consignor is in Sweden while origin is China is completely normal and valid per rule 4.5 — origin refers to where goods are manufactured, not where the consignor is located. Result: MATCH.
checkpoint_results.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'P:R. China' (People's Republic of China) verifieras mot fakturans explicita 'Country of Origin: China'. Efter normalisering av landsnamn matchar uppgifterna exakt.

evidence_records.raw_text: GRACE Catalyst AB, Industrivägen, 44432 Stenungsund, Sweden

evidence_records.relevance: Consignor country confirmation via SE prefix
Consignee name, address and country verification

evidence_records.raw_text: Helensville Group FZE, Business Centre, Sharjah, Publishing City Free Zone, SHARJAH, UNIT.ARAB EMIR.
evidence_records.relevance: Identifies the Bill-to party as different from consignee, supporting Ship-To-regel application
Gross weight incl pallets verification source
Gross weight incl pallets verification target

rule_evaluation_log.detail: No LC reference found in certificate

Document A (certificate file) contains pages 1-2: ORIGINAL and COPY of same certificate SEG-24D-189065. Document B (invoice file) contains pages 1-4: Invoice 97805446 (pages 1, 3) and Terms and Conditions (pages 2, 4). Verification uses ORIGINAL certificate (page 1) and Invoice 97805446 from invoice file.
Criteria 2 (consignor match) and 3 (consignee match) both satisfied.
Grace Catalyst AB found in invoice header, address block, Shipped From, and footer.
Sweden = Sweden, confirmed via address and VAT prefix SE.
Certificate consignee matches Ship to exactly. Bill-to is Helensville Group FZE (different party). Both in same invoice.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Controlled text matching for goods description
rule_evaluation_log.detail: POLYTRAK(R)8522W-T matches POLYTRAK®8522W-T after trademark symbol normalization.
Invoice values 2.640 and 3.894 normalized by removing period as thousands separator to 2640 and 3894.
All three weight values match: NW 2640=2640, GW 3894=3894, GW incl pallets 4147=4147.
P:R. China normalized to China. Invoice states China explicitly.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändaren Grace Catalyst AB i Sverige identifieras som fakturautställare, mottagaren Turkmenbashi oil refinery återfinns i fakturans Ship to-fält, varubeskrivningen POLYTRAK(R)8522W-T matchar, samtliga vikter (netto 2640 kg, brutto 3894 kg, brutto inkl pallar 4147 kg) överensstämmer, och ursprungslandet Kina bekräftas explicit i fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary: All five checkpoints (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, country of origin) result in MATCH. The certificate consignor Grace Catalyst AB is the invoice issuer. The consignee Turkmenbashi oil refinery is identified in the Ship to field (Ship-To-regel applied as the billing party is Helensville Group FZE). Goods description POLYTRAK(R)8522W-T matches POLYTRAK®8522W-T. All weight values match after thousands separator normalization. Country of origin P:R. China matches invoice's China.
non_blocking_notes: The invoice Sold-to field contains only a customer number (870451), not a named company. Consignee verification relies on Ship-To-regel (4.2.0.3).
Invoice uses period as thousands separator in weight values (e.g., 2.640 KG), normalized per rule 4.4.3.3.
Certificate origin is written as 'P:R. China' — minor punctuation variant of 'P.R. China'.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: Grace Catalyst AB, Industrivägen, 44432, Stenungsund, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: GRACE Catalyst AB, Industrivägen, 44432 Stenungsund, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Regel 4.1.0 – Consignor identifieras direkt i fakturans sidhuvud och adressblock. Land verifierat via explicit angivelse och VAT-ID prefix SE (4.1.2.1).
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Grace Catalyst AB' identifieras exakt i fakturan som utställare 'GRACE Catalyst AB' med identisk adress (Industrivägen, 44432 Stenungsund, Sweden). Namnmatchning efter normalisering av versaler/gemener. Land Sweden bekräftas explicit och via VAT-ID prefix SE.

sections.invoice_value: Ship to: Turkmenbashi oil refinery, 745005 TURKMENBASHI, TURKMENISTAN
sections.rule_applied: Regel 4.2.0.3 – Ship-To-regel. Certifikatets consignee matchar fakturans Ship to-part exakt. Fakturans köparpart (Helensville Group FZE) är ett handelsbolag i en annan roll.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Turkmenbashi oil refinery, 745005 TURKMENBASHI, Turkmenistan' återfinns exakt i fakturans Ship to-fält. Ship-To-regeln tillämpas eftersom fakturans köparpart (Helensville Group FZE, UAE) utgör ett handelsmässigt mellanled. Alla fyra villkor för Ship-To-regeln är uppfyllda. Land: Turkmenistan matchar TURKMENISTAN.

sections.rule_applied: Regel 4.3.3 – Kontrollerad textmatchning. Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning POLYTRAK(R)8522W-T matchar POLYTRAK®8522W-T efter normalisering av varumärkessymbol.
sections.motivation: Produktidentifieraren 'POLYTRAK(R)8522W-T' i certifikatet matchar 'POLYTRAK®8522W-T' i fakturan. Symbolerna (R) och ® är ekvivalenta representationer av registered trademark-symbolen. Ytterligare information i fakturan (HS-kod, vikter) påverkar inte produktidentiteten (regel 4.3.4).

sections.certificate_value: Net weight 2640 kg / Gross weight 3894 kg / Gross weight incl pallets 4147 kg
sections.invoice_value: Net Weight 2.640 KG / Gross Weight 3.894 KG / Gross weight including pallets: 4147 kgs
sections.rule_applied: Regel 4.4.3 – Numerisk verifiering med tusentalsavskiljarnormalisering (4.4.3.3). Punkt tolkas som tusentalsavskiljare i fakturans viktvärden.
sections.motivation: Samtliga tre viktuppgifter matchar: Nettovikt 2640 kg = 2.640 KG (punkt som tusentalsavskiljare), Bruttovikt 3894 kg = 3.894 KG, Bruttovikt inkl pallar 4147 kg = 4147 kgs. Tusentalsavskiljarnormalisering tillämpas (regel 4.4.3.3) — kontexten (33 fat à 80 kg = 2640 kg) bekräftar att punkt är tusentalsavskiljare. Inga motsägelser identifierade.

sections.rule_applied: Regel 4.5.4 – Normalisering av landsnamn. P:R. China (People's Republic of China) normaliseras till China.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'P:R. China' normaliseras till 'China' (vedertagen kortform av People's Republic of China). Fakturan anger 'Country of Origin: China' explicit vid produktraden och i varudetaljavsnittet. Exakt matchning efter normalisering.

output_quality_checks.consistency_details: All 5 applicable checkpoints have status MATCH. comparison_result is IDENTICAL. workflow_recommendation is AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE. No MISMATCH or MANUAL_REVIEW checkpoints exist. All confidence values are ≥ 0.85. Consistency verified.
output_quality_checks.confidence_floor_details: All applicable checkpoints have confidence ≥ 0.85 (lowest is 0.95 for consignee). IDENTICAL result is valid.
